name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: The page is now "Work Shifts / Off Day", and each employee has their own colour so they're easy to tell apart on the calendar.
Shifts are a per-month roster you can add, edit and delete (Morning / Night) — view past months or set future months in advance.
Cleaner layout: calendar and shift roster side by side, with the plan-a-day-off form and the month's log below.
